summary: Completed comprehensive testing of WM Finance app - Backend excellent (95.8% success), Frontend has authentication and UI rendering issues

minor_issues.impact: Cannot test with provided credentials, but registration works

critical_bugs.issue: User sessions expire quickly, frequent logout redirects to login page
AI Chat button not visible or accessible in UI despite backend API working

ui_bugs.issue: Charts show width/height errors (-1 values) in console warnings
Some protected pages show only generic 'WM Finance' title instead of specific content
Add income/expense buttons not consistently visible on transactions page

integration_issues.issue: Authentication tokens not properly persisted, causing frequent re-authentication

passed_tests: All CRUD operations (accounts, categories, directions, contractors, transactions, planned payments, projects)
Dashboard page with cards and charts
Transaction form opening and data entry
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend authentication session persistence issues and make AI Chat button visible. Backend is working excellently. Address chart rendering console warnings and ensure protected pages load proper content consistently.
